prompt: which repo best matches a beginner local llm setup on a weak laptop

result_cards.title: ollama/ollama
result_cards.summary: Run large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API. Good for getting started quickly on laptops.

result_cards.title: ggml-org/llama.cpp
result_cards.summary: Low-level C/C++ inference runtime for running LLMs on CPU and GPU with strong portability and performance.

result_cards.title: oobabooga/text-generation-webui
result_cards.summary: A flexible web UI for running large language models with many options and knobs.
